description: Counterparty definition table. One row per counterparty. Stores the reference data for all counterparties used in Murex trades. Joined to TRN_HDR_DBF via TRN_HDR_DBF.M_COUNTRPART = TRN_CPDF_DBF.M_ID.

fields.remark: Primary key. Join target from TRN_HDR_DBF.M_COUNTRPART.
Human-readable display name of the counterparty. PII — must be tokenised before any LLM processing.
